{{Infobox character
| name = Shai
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|strips of Violet Light}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Alin's youngest sister}}{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|, Alin's little sister}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Shai is the youngest sister of [[Alin]]. At fourteen years old, she is characterized by a frequently bored or flat expression that often masks her intense interest in her surroundings. She possesses a curious nature, frequently exploring [[Enosh]] to touch and examine various objects, and has demonstrated an interest in mechanics by dismantling clockwork. She is known to collect diverse trinkets, such as glass bottles, twine, and wind-up toys. Shai has also shown a penchant for storytelling, including accounts of her infiltration into the [[Tartarus Travelers]]' barracks. While she once appeared to be a regular inhabitant of [[Enosh]], she eventually becomes an [[Elysian Traveler]]. In this role, she wears a white-and-gold uniform and demonstrates the ability to open a [[Gate to Elysia]].}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Shai]] is [[Alin]]'s youngest sister and is fourteen years old.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Shai]] is a character who has a pile of clockwork.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Shai]] is a companion of [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Shai]] is [[Alin]]'s little sister and wields strips of [[Violet Light]] like whips.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Shai]] is potentially an [[Elysian Traveler]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Shai]] wears a white-and-gold uniform.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Even Shai piped up. “Too proud,” she submitted, from the floor next to her pile of clockwork.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"He was sitting between Shai and Ilana, tearing into a roast pork sandwich, listening to Shai tell a story..."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
